title: BEM-867 check isolated battle
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox.json')
result = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem867_battle_audit_mailbox_result.json')
mail = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md')
result_text = result.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if result.exists() else ''
mail_text = mail.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if mail.exists() else ''
lines = [line.strip() for line in mail_text.splitlines()]
final = None
for s in ['Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES', 'Status: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON']:
    if s in lines:
        final = s.split(': ', 1)[1]
        break
has_sections = all(token in mail_text for token in ['Findings:', 'Evidence:', 'Recommendation:'])
if final and has_sections:
    status = 'BATTLE_AUDIT_MAILBOX_CONFIRMED_' + final
elif result.exists() and '"status": "DISPATCHED"' in result_text:
    status = 'DISPATCHED_WAITING_ISOLATED_MAILBOX'
elif result.exists() and '"status": "DISPATCH_FAILED"' in result_text:
    status = 'DISPATCH_FAILED'
elif processed.exists():
    status = 'QUEUE_PROCESSED_NO_RESULT'
elif queue.exists():
    status = 'QUEUE_STILL_PENDING_ISOLATED'
else:
    status = 'QUEUE_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_ISOLATED_BATTLE_RESULT_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 isolated battle result\nStatus: ' + status + '\nQueue exists: ' + str(queue.exists()) + '\nProcessed exists: ' + str(processed.exists()) + '\nResult exists: ' + str(result.exists()) + '\nFinal: ' + str(final) + '\nHas sections: ' + str(has_sections) + '\n\nResult text:\n' + result_text[:4000] + '\n\nMailbox text:\n' + mail_text[:4000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 isolated battle result: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
